blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero section with large background image, heading, subheading, and optional CTA buttons
blockPalette.usage: Top section of homepage and treatment pages with large imagery and brand messaging

blockPalette.name: cards
blockPalette.description: Grid of content items, each with icon/image, heading, and description text
blockPalette.usage: Feature/benefit highlights on homepage (natural results, leading brand, lasting results, satisfaction) and treatment pages (3 feature cards)

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.usage: Before/after image comparisons, image + text layouts on treatment and FAQ pages

blockPalette.name: accordion
blockPalette.description: Expandable/collapsible content sections for Q&A patterns
blockPalette.usage: FAQ sections on treatment pages and the main FAQ page; each item has a question heading and answer text

blockPalette.name: tabs
blockPalette.description: Tabbed interface switching between content panels
blockPalette.usage: Treatment areas section (VROUWELIJK/MANNELIJK tabs) appearing on homepage and all treatment pages

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.usage: Product carousel on treatment pages showing JUVÉDERM product range (VOLBELLA, VOLIFT, VOLUMA, ULTRA, etc.)

blockPalette.name: fragment
blockPalette.description: Reusable content section that can be embedded across multiple pages
blockPalette.usage: Shared treatment-areas tabs section, shared clinic-finder CTA section, shared references/footnotes

navigation.header: Two dropdown menus (Behandeling, FAQ) + CTA button (Vind je kliniek)
navigation.footer: Mirrored nav + utility links + social links + regulatory disclaimer

sharedSections.treatmentAreasTabs: VROUWELIJK/MANNELIJK tabs with treatment links - appears on homepage and all treatment pages
sharedSections.clinicFinder: Location search CTA - appears on homepage and all treatment pages
sharedSections.regulatoryDisclaimer: Required regulatory footer text on all pages
sharedSections.references: Numbered reference list (footnotes) on treatment and FAQ pages

siteConventions.imageSource: Adobe Dynamic Media (dm-aid URLs with preferwebp=true&quality=85)
contentNotes: Medical/pharmaceutical content requires careful preservation of reference numbers
Footnote markers (superscript numbers) must be preserved in content
Regulatory disclaimer text is mandatory on all pages
Before/after images must include Voor/Na labels
